news.summary: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

news.headline: Partey denied entry to Canada for Ghana's World Cup opener
news.summary: Ghana midfielder Thomas Partey will miss his nation's first World Cup game in Toronto against Panama, after being denied entry to Canada.

news.headline: Canada draw with Bosnia-Herzegovina to earn first ever World Cup point
news.summary:
<p>Co-hosts Canada grabbed a second-half equaliser to draw 1-1 with Bosnia and Herzegovina on Friday in the first World Cup finals game ever played on Canadian soil.</p>

news.headline: World Cup 2026: Co-host Canada draws with Bosnia in Group B opener
news.summary: Co-host nation Canada salvaged a 1-1 draw against Bosnia-Herzegovina on Friday night at Toronto's BMO Field, but missed a string of clear-cut chances that could have delivered a winning start to their Group B campaign.

news.headline: Western Australia Is Battling a Mouse Plague
news.summary: For months, mice have been found in tea kettles, crunched by car tires and even appeared in people’s beds. In one town, the end might be in sight.

news.headline: What are the African teams' chances?
news.summary: A record number of African nations are at the 2026 World Cup, but South Africa’s opening defeat to Mexico has raised questions about the continent’s chances. Can African teams turn numbers into history and finally challenge for football’s biggest prize?

news.headline: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push: Sources
